stories.title: Mexico rejoice after second World Cup win in 2026....
stories.summary: Mexico still don't look like a finished product, but fine-tuning can wait for another day as the co-hosts punched their ticket to the round of 32.

stories.title: Korea GK gaffe helps Mexico clinch 1st in Group A
stories.summary: Mexico took advantage of a defensive blunder by South Korea to win 1-0 on Thursday and become the first team to advance to the knockout stage of the FIFA World Cup.

stories.title: Clark builds 4-shot lead as U.S. Open suspended
stories.summary: Wyndham Clark, who will finish the final two holes of his first round Friday, has a four-shot cushion in the U.S. Open as play was suspended because of darkness.

stories.title: Canada, Marsch 'shaken' by gruesome Koné injury
stories.summary: Canada midfielder Ismaël Koné was stretchered off the field in the second half of the host nation's match against Qatar on Thursday at BC Place in Vancouver.

stories.title: Pulisic still training solo a day before U.S. game...
stories.summary: U.S. manager Maurico Pochettino said star attacker Christian Pulisic is "much better'" in terms of the injury to his left calf but will be assessed by the medical staff Thursday night to determine his availability to play against Australia on Friday.
